title: uvedalia linearis var. lutea
intro: Uvedalia linearis var. lutea, also known as Uvedalia lutea or the Golden Uvedalia, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, characterized by its golden flowers and linear leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Uvedalia lutea include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine.
